Dialog.name: TRL_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 24}The Monad Passage is a type of Monad door leading to {f 0 1 2}the depths of Tartarus{f 0 1 27}. There is {f 0 1 2}one per section of a block{f 0 1 27}. Each Monad Passage opens in response to a {f 0 1 2}Major Arcana card{f 0 1 27}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}A {f 0 1 2}Formidable Shadow{f 0 1 27} resides in the innermost area, and beyond it lies a treasure chest holding a {f 0 1 2}valuable item{f 0 1 27}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}The entrance to the Monad Passage will remain permanently on the same floor in the same location, {f 0 1 2}even after the turn of a new day{f 0 1 27}. If you feel outmatched, consider revisiting after training some.[n]{f 1 1}
